scripts.build: node scripts/generate-blog.js && vite build && mkdir -p dist/admin && cp dist/index.html dist/admin/index.html
scripts.pseo:fixture: node scripts/pseo/01_fetch_issuers.mjs --fixture && node scripts/pseo/02_fetch_claims_bc.mjs --fixture && node scripts/pseo/03_fetch_claims_on.mjs --fixture && node scripts/pseo/04_match_owners.mjs --fixture && node scripts/pseo/05_fetch_geometry.mjs --fixture && node scripts/pseo/06_render_maps.mjs --fixture --skip-og && node scripts/pseo/07_generate_pages.mjs --fixture
